narrative:
Precinct Butler Twp South (precinct in Columbiana County) has 769 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
